title: poa elatior var. pratensis
intro: Poa elatior var. pratensis, also known as meadow fescue, is a type of grass species within the Poa genus. It is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and is often used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Poa elatior var. pratensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal consumption.
